title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Doflamingo Family, Don Chinjao, Jesus Burgess, Luffy, Unknown person #1 as law moves toward the Caesar exchange at Green Bit while Luffy is drawn deeper into the Colosseum’s violent tournament.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Back of the colosseum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Medi- Cal Room is over there

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We don't have enough stretches, so those who can walk on their own should do so!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Shit ... to think that he would be participating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He really messed these guys up in

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: That champion guy ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Get a grip! It's over! You're fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Scary ... that monster ...Gonna kill me ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My eyesight ain't that bad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No matter how much you disguise your- self...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OH! It's you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'd never forget the face of the bastard who left such a scar on my career....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THE GUY WHO CAUSED ALL THAT TROUBLE FOR OLD MAN CHESTNUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's Bellamy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: former captain of the bellany pirate crew 'Beliquu' the 'Huena

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right, Bellamy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Maro ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why're you here !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not like I live on Jaya

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm free to go wherever I want

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Doflamingo has been something of an idol to me since I was a kid ...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't much care about the "mera Mera no mi"... but there is a reason why I've got to win this thing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So we'll be fighting again, then !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: but I'm not the man I was back then...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Strawhat... I went to sky island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I lost my crewmates... but everything I thought I knew was shaken

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You went to Skypiea!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You!! You better not have laid a hand on those sky people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WELL....

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Anyway, I've no grudge against you anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In order to overcome the great wave that's coming ...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I will place myself on Doflamingo's ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't mock you anymore

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: should he triumph in today's event ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: His tenacity will finally bear fruit!! It has been decided that in the event of victory, he will be publicly promoted

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: To the rank of officer, in the Donqui- XOTE family !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: that nominee to win the whole thing is none other than ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Pirate ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: BEL- LAMY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Bellamy the hyena !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: BEL- LAMY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He sure is popular... that guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Hmph

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What block are you in, Lucy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I'M IN ...

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
